title: Static Server
sub: Fast, flexible and reliable static server built on Node.js and Express
features_subtitle: Everything you need to serve static content and dynamic pages

features.title: Static Content
features.description: Serve images, fonts, scripts and styles with built-in compression and CORS support

features.title: Template Engine
features.description: Dynamic HTML rendering with EJS — layouts, blocks and reusable components

features.title: Multilingual
features.description: Full i18n support with automatic language detection from cookie, query or headers

about_text: We build developer-friendly tools that make web projects simpler. Our static content server is designed to be lightweight, fast and easy to extend.
contact_text: Have a question? Send us a message and we will get back to you shortly.
